x y : Fin self.size

        else
          if self[↑x].rank = self[↑y].rank then
            (self.set x { parent := ↑y, rank := self[↑x].rank }).set ⟨↑y, ⋯⟩
              { parent := self[↑y].parent, rank := self[↑y].rank + 1 }
          else self.set x { parent := ↑y, rank := self[↑x].rank }).size =
    self.size

    self.size

B : Type u₁
inst✝¹ : Quiver B
C : Type u₂
inst✝ : Bicategory C
F : B ⥤q C
a b : FreeBicategory B
f g : a ⟶ b
η θ : Hom₂ f g
H : Rel η θ
⊢ (match a, b, f, g, η with
    | x, x_1, x_2, .(x_2), Hom₂.id .(x_2) => 𝟙 (liftHom F x_2)
    | X, Z, .((f ≫ g) ≫ h), .(f ≫ g ≫ h), Hom₂.associator f g h => (α_ (liftHom F f) (liftHom F g) (liftHom F h)).hom
    | X, Z, .(f ≫ g ≫ h), .((f ≫ g) ≫ h), Hom₂.associator_inv f g h =>
      (α_ (liftHom F f) (liftHom F g) (liftHom F h)).inv
    | X, Z, .(𝟙 X ≫ a), a, Hom₂.left_unitor .(a) => (λ_ (liftHom F a)).hom
    | X, Z, a, .(𝟙 X ≫ a), Hom₂.left_unitor_inv .(a) => (λ_ (liftHom F a)).inv
    | X, Y, .(a ≫ 𝟙 Y), a, Hom₂.right_unitor .(a) => (ρ_ (liftHom F a)).hom
    | X, Y, a, .(a ≫ 𝟙 Y), Hom₂.right_unitor_inv .(a) => (ρ_ (liftHom F a)).inv
    | x, x_1, x_2, x_3, η.vcomp θ => liftHom₂ F η ≫ liftHom₂ F θ
    | X, Z, .(f ≫ g), .(f ≫ h), Hom₂.whisker_left f η => liftHom F f ◁ liftHom₂ F η
    | a, c, .(Hom.comp f h), .(Hom.comp g h), Hom₂.whisker_right h η => liftHom₂ F η ▷ liftHom F h) =
    match a, b, f, g, θ with
    | x, x_1, x_2, .(x_2), Hom₂.id .(x_2) => 𝟙 (liftHom F x_2)
    | X, Z, .((f ≫ g) ≫ h), .(f ≫ g ≫ h), Hom₂.associator f g h => (α_ (liftHom F f) (liftHom F g) (liftHom F h)).hom
    | X, Z, .(f ≫ g ≫ h), .((f ≫ g) ≫ h), Hom₂.associator_inv f g h =>
      (α_ (liftHom F f) (liftHom F g) (liftHom F h)).inv
    | X, Z, .(𝟙 X ≫ a), a, Hom₂.left_unitor .(a) => (λ_ (liftHom F a)).hom
    | X, Z, a, .(𝟙 X ≫ a), Hom₂.left_unitor_inv .(a) => (λ_ (liftHom F a)).inv
    | X, Y, .(a ≫ 𝟙 Y), a, Hom₂.right_unitor .(a) => (ρ_ (liftHom F a)).hom
    | X, Y, a, .(a ≫ 𝟙 Y), Hom₂.right_unitor_inv .(a) => (ρ_ (liftHom F a)).inv
    | x, x_1, x_2, x_3, η.vcomp θ => liftHom₂ F η ≫ liftHom₂ F θ
    | X, Z, .(f ≫ g), .(f ≫ h), Hom₂.whisker_left f η => liftHom F f ◁ liftHom₂ F η
    | a, c, .(Hom.comp f h), .(Hom.comp g h), Hom₂.whisker_right h η => liftHom₂ F η ▷ liftHom F h
